content_body: This was a great couples retreat!  The cabin was perfectly warm and inviting. We relaxed, watched movies, and really enjoyed the piano room that we renamed the Boom Boom Room! :) We chilled in the hot tub, and loved the kitchen as well. There wre great meals prepared and enjoyed. We will definitely do this again!! Thank you Mayfly Lodge! ~ Love, the Davids and Riley's
title: We will definitely do this again!
